policy: install only declared primary-source artifacts, verify upstream checksums, record exact RPM NEVRA and binary versions, and never build source on the live host

packages.name: PostgreSQL
packages.verification: PGDG RPM signature, exact reviewed minor version, and installed NEVRA evidence

packages.name: PgBouncer
packages.source: PGDG common repository for Enterprise Linux 9 x86_64
packages.verification: PGDG RPM signature and installed NEVRA evidence

packages.name: pgBackRest
packages.source: PGDG common repository for Enterprise Linux 9 x86_64
packages.verification: PGDG RPM signature and installed NEVRA evidence

packages.name: OCI CLI
packages.verification: Oracle RPM signature plus exact installed NEVRA evidence

packages.name: cosign
packages.verification: Exact official Sigstore GitHub release checksum and installed version evidence
